context.description: Sources section listing books and papers cited for a work about consciousness, perception, psychology, mythology, spirituality, and related critique of science and power. The references include Daniel Kahneman, G.I. Gurdjieff, Mircea Eliade, Joseph Campbell, Stephen Porges, and other authors across psychology, philosophy, esotericism, and political analysis.
normalization_notes: Translated section title Quellen as Sources.
Classified as a bibliography-style book page within chapter text.
